title: Magic and Chaos
description: A modpack sort of like RLcraft featuring skill trees, skill points, magic wands, other universes, and many more...
body:
### Things I Would Recomend Checking Out:

- **Voice Chat Interactions (make sure to set up properly)**
- Remorphed
- **Origins**
- Pehkui
- **Trainguys animation**

### **What to do first: change the keybinds because a lot of them overlap, and if you want a good expirience playing change them first.**

## Some main things are:

> - **Ad Astera**
> - The whole RPG series
> - **Bending**
> - Better Nether and End
> - **Combat Roll**
> - Copper Golem
> - **Deeper and Darker**
> - Do a Barrel Roll and Rolling under the Deep
> - **Elemental Wizards**
> - Ender Dragon Fight Remastered
> - **Explorify**
> - Fabric Seasons
> - **First Person Model**
> - Geoliphilic
> - **Gravestones**
> - Icarus
> - **Immersive Aircraft**
> - Trainguys animations
> - **Iris Shaders**
> - Item Physics
> - **Mob Captins**
> - Nether 3.0
> - **Nether Portal Spread**
> - Netherite Extras
> - **Netherite Horse Armor**
> - Origins
> - **Pehkui**
> - Pufferfish's Skills
> - **Remorphed**
> - Runes
> - **Voice Chat and Voice Chat Interaction**
> - Simply Skills
> - **Sodium**
> - Trims Effects
> - **Wakes**
> - Zoomify
> - **Wild Temperatures**
